scripts.dev: npm run dev -w packages/server & npm run dev -w packages/client
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build -w packages/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/server && npm run typecheck -w packages/client
scripts.lint: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/client/tsconfig.json
